requires: ORIGINAL_DEADLINE; request filed earlier than the final three days; justification; no third-party prejudice; first request
calculation: ELIGIBLE if filingDate < originalDeadline - 3 days and remaining requirements are met
confidenceGate: Do not auto-classify if original deadline or filing timestamp is missing.

requires: No express denial notified before original deadline
calculation: new term = half of initial term; only one extension; express grant may set a shorter extension
confidenceGate: The engine must wait for or reconcile any express decision received before original deadline.

calculation: Use explicit new deadline/duration. Denial only defeats automatic effect if timely under the printed/legal rule.
confidenceGate: Keep original and updated deadline as separate assertions.
Do not call the request granted merely because six months elapsed; store procedural silence separately.

calculation: 15 days from the day after notification
confidenceGate: Never use issue/upload/scan date as substitute.
Reposition and economic-administrative claim are alternatives at first instance.

calculation: Monthly: September 2024 onward. Quarterly: Q3 2024 onward. Earlier periods use previous correction system.
confidenceGate: Apply exception routes for overcharged VAT and Chapter XI special regimes.

requires: Resolution entered at competent execution body
calculation: Execution acts should be notified within 1 month
confidenceGate: Entry date is not the same as the review-resolution issue date.
This is not an ordinary appeal deadline.
If no replacement is appropriate, expect a reasoned communication instead.

requires: No specific validity rule and no change in determining circumstances
calculation: 12 months for periodic obligations; 3 months for non-periodic obligations
confidenceGate: Specific certificate rules or changed facts override the general period.
